data.body: Investigation (INTERMEDIATE, opus): write_commit_event (ticket-lib.sh:242) calls _push_tickets_branch after each commit, which is best-effort: on non-rebase errors it logs 'Warning:' to stderr and returns 0 silently with NO retry. Non-fast-forward path does retry via fetch+rebase but aborts silently on conflicts. Under rapid-fire link ops (especially relates_to which writes 2 events at line 440), concurrent sessions or transient errors accumulate local commits silently. No session-end drain exists. ESCALATE: full fix needs layered change — (a) retry in non-rebase-error branch with sentinel file .push-pending recording unpushed SHAs, (b) drain pending on next operation / session-end, (c) collapse bidirectional relates_to writes to single push. Significant architectural change to ticket-lib.sh; requires user approval.
